talents.name: Passion Surge
talents.desc: When Melody is active, there is a 15% fixed chance per second to gain Passion Surge. Passion Surge: Special Attack costs zero Performance Passion for 10s. Removed after Special Attack is cast.

talents.name: String Expansion
talents.desc: Performance Passion max limit +1.

talents.name: Heat Surge
talents.desc: When Melody is activated, the trigger chance for Passion Surge +an extra 3% every 1 second (up to 30%). Passion Surge: Special Attack costs zero Performance Passion for 10s. Removed after Special Attack is cast.

talents.name: Intellect Conversion
talents.desc: Every 10 points of Intellect provides 1 point of MATK.

talents.name: Arcane Ascension
talents.desc: Special Attack costs 1 less Performance Passion.

talents.name: Melody: Heat Core
talents.desc: Melody heals ally targets below 50% HP with 100% bonus effect.

talents.name: Flame Pursuit
talents.desc: After using 3 Special Attacks, the next Basic Attack hit triggers Flame Pillar Blast.

talents.name: Flame Pursuit II
talents.desc: Flame Pillar Blast becomes a two-hit combo.

talents.name: Dissonance Spec
talents.desc: While in Rhapsody of Flame, increases all Luck Chance acquired by any means by 50% and increases Resistance by 25%. Healing of Stillness: If you deal no DMG to enemies for 5s, each hit of your Basic Attack will heal up to 10 allies (Party Members Prioritized), with the full 4-hit combo restoring 15.05% of their max HP in total. Maintaining Heroic Melody and Rhapsody of Flame is crucial. Heroic Melody enhances healing while consecutive Fierce Strikes accelerate Harmonic Anthem casting frequency.

talents.name: Lucky Soundwave
talents.desc: Gains 1 Soundwave Energy whenever Expertise Skills or Amplified Beat trigger a Lucky Strike.

talents.name: Trio Rhapsody
talents.desc: Rhapsody of Flame always appears in its most powerful form. While in Rhapsody of Flame, healing +20%.

talents.name: Severed Chapter
talents.desc: Increases Resilience Break Efficiency of self and Allies within 30 meters by 10%. This effect cannot stack. After activating Heroic Melody, you and Allies within 30 meters have an resilience break efficiency +30% and deal 15% more DMG to Resilience Broken targets. This effect cannot stack.

talents.name: Sound Blaze
talents.desc: Gains 1 Soundwave Energy each time you deal DMG equal to 10 times ATK. Soundwave Energy stores up to 50. Skills consuming Performance Passion trigger Scorching Impact when dealing DMG, consuming all Soundwave Energy. Each 1 Soundwave Energy increases Scorching Impact DMG by 10%.

talents.name: Healing Note
talents.desc: Basic Attack deals an extra instance of DMG. For every 5 Soundwave Energy obtained, creates a Note for the ally with the lowest HP.

talents.name: Blazing Heal
talents.desc: Stores excess Healing (up to 500% of Max HP). After activating Heroic Melody, consumes stored Healing to recover allies' HP every 1 second, up to 15% of Max HP per second.

talents.name: Concerto
talents.desc: During Rhapsody of Flame, Amplified Beat gains 1 additional attack. Amplified Beat's DMG -20%.

talents.name: Restart
talents.desc: When Harmonic Anthem or Fierce Strike triggers a Lucky Strike, limited to a single activation when striking multiple targets, immediately resets Rhapsody of Flame's CD and allows Rhapsody of Flame not to consume Performance Passion for 10s, this effect is nullified upon casting Rhapsody of Flame.

talents.name: Concerto Spec
talents.desc: Replaces Special Attack with Healing Beat. While Healing Melody is active, reduces the remaining CD of Fivefold Crescendo and Passion Burst by 1 second per second. Precisely placing the speaker ensures it echoes your Expertise whenever they are cast.

talents.name: Brilliant Charge
talents.desc: When Healing Beat or Passion Burst applies Crit Healing or deals Crit DMG (triggers only once when hitting multiple targets), gains 1 Performance Passion.

talents.name: Double Recovery Note
talents.desc: Healing Beat provides an additional equal Healing to targets under the influence of Healing Melody.

talents.name: Crit Healing
talents.desc: Increases Crit Healing by 25%.

talents.name: Fiery Beat
talents.desc: Healing Beat Crit Rate +10%. Healing Beat Healing +10%.

talents.name: Critical Encore
talents.desc: Every 1% Crit Rate grants 1% trigger chance for Encore Strings.

talents.name: Passion Fury
talents.desc: For each 10 Performance Passion consumed, enhances Passion Burst to Passion Fury for 10s.

talents.name: Stat Resonance
talents.desc: While Healing Melody is active, grants allies appropriate buffs (Strength, Intellect, Agility) equal to 8% of Intellect. (Buffs from different Beat Performers cannot stack. Only one with the highest value applies.)

talents.name: Stat Resonance Crit
talents.desc: For 10s after using Passion Burst or its enhanced form (Passion Fury), doubles the buffs that Healing Melody provides to allies.

talents.name: Fire Day
talents.desc: Increases Fire Bonus by 8% when attacking Elite or higher targets.

talents.name: Critical Acclaim
talents.desc: During Center Stage, triggering Encore Strings has a 30% fixed chance to grant Passion Surge. Passion Surge: Special Attack costs zero Performance Passion for 10s. Removed after Special Attack is cast.

talents.name: Rhythm Spirit
talents.desc: Defeating an enemy has a fixed 50% chance to grant you 1 Performance Passion.

talents.name: Infinite Rhapsody
talents.desc: Replace Ultimate Rock the Stage with Infinite Rhapsody.

talents.name: Concert Circuit
talents.desc: Replace Ultimate Rock the Stage with Concert Circuit.

talents.name: Encore Chain
talents.desc: When Encore Strings triggers, it activates a second time on the same target. Lucky Strike Chance is reduced by 20%.

talents.name: Heat Boost
talents.desc: When Intellect reaches 500, the Performance Energy cap +20%.

talents.name: Variation
talents.desc: Increases Max HP by 20% and activates Dissonance Spec with its original effect intact. If Concerto Spec is activated, its effect is adjusted to replace Basic Attack with Resonant Strings.

talents.name: Melody Chord
talents.desc: Melody Healing +20%. Each 1% Haste increases the REG SPD of Performance Passion by 1%.

talents.name: Exaltation
talents.desc: Performance Energy REG SPD +10%.

talents.name: Indomitable Chord
talents.desc: While Heroic Melody is active, grants Super Armor, increases Resistance by 25%, and boosts movement speed by 10%.

talents.name: Swing Reflux
talents.desc: Hitting a target with Fierce Strike recovers 5 Performance Energy. Each additional target hit provides 1 extra Performance Energy, up to 10 total.

talents.name: Luck Multiplier
talents.desc: Every 1% Luck grants 0.5% Lucky Strike DMG Multiplier. After activating Heroic Melody, doubles its conversion efficiency.

talents.name: Resonant Counterpoint
talents.desc: When a Note forms, there's a 50% fixed chance to create an extra Note for a different target.

talents.name: Sonic Cure
talents.desc: When Expertise deal DMG (only triggers once when hitting multiple targets), additionally heal targets with Note.

talents.name: Sonic Therapy
talents.desc: Converted healing from DMG +20% for targets affected by Note.

talents.name: Flame's Rampage
talents.desc: When Heroic Melody is active, Rhapsody of Flame will erupt, dealing Magic Damage equal to 50% ATK every 3s to targets it touches (DMG interval affected by Haste). While in Rhapsody of Flame, each hit of Harmonic Anthem also heals 1 ally with the lowest HP for 30% of the DMG dealt.

talents.name: Flame Note
talents.desc: When you use an Expertise Skill, Rhapsody of Flame will erupt with Rhythm, dealing Magic Damage equal to 100% of ATK and granting Note to allies it touches.

talents.name: Finale Command
talents.desc: Within 10s of casting Encore, each use of Rhapsody of Flame caused targets affected by Encore to trigger Encore Strings.

talents.name: Encore Persistence
talents.desc: Permanently benefits from Encore effect. For every 5 triggers of Encore Strings, the next Amplified Beat and Harmonic Anthem deal 50% more DMG.

talents.name: Encore Luck Boost
talents.desc: Every 1% Luck Chance grants 1% trigger chance for Encore Strings.

talents.name: Encore Sharp Strike
talents.desc: Triggering Encore Strings to deal DMG or healing grants 2 Performance Energy. If the Encore Strings triggers Lucky Strike, grants 3 additional Performance Energy.

talents.name: Absolute Center Stage
talents.desc: After you use Center Stage, the number of enhanced skills increases from 1 to 2.

talents.name: Center Stage: Mad Tune
talents.desc: Each Performance Passion consumed reduces the CD of Center Stage by 1 second.

talents.name: Tower Multiwave
talents.desc: Casting Center Stage immediately extends Heroic Melody by 5s.

talents.name: Soundwave Overclock
talents.desc: Upon casting Center Stage, grants 15 Soundwave Energy, and doubles all the Soundwave Energy gained in the next 10s.

talents.name: Crit Charge Rhythm
talents.desc: Fivefold Crescendo deals Crit DMG or healing (only triggers once for multiple targets), grants 2 Performance Energy. When Healing Melody lands a Crit Hit, grants 1 Performance Energy(only triggers once for multiple targets).

talents.name: Tower Flame Blast
talents.desc: The speaker releases a Flame Shock every 5s.

talents.name: Multi-Target Heat Amp
talents.desc: Passion Burst and its enhanced version (Passion Fury) deal 5% more DMG per additional target hit, up to 25%.

talents.name: Heated Tower Flame Blast
talents.desc: When Passion Burst and its enhanced version (Passion Fury) hit the speaker, it immediately releases a Flame Shock.

talents.name: Sonic Verdict
talents.desc: While Healing Melody is active, Fivefold Crescendo also deals DMG, with its total DMG scaling equal to its healing multiplier. While Healing Melody is active, reduces the caster's DMG taken by 15%.

talents.name: Harmonic Amplifier
talents.desc: Increases the DMG dealt and healing of skills triggered by the speaker by 30%.

talents.name: Crescendo Healing Chord
talents.desc: For every second Healing Melody remains active, enhances its Healing by 7%, stacking up to 5 times.

talents.name: Crit Scale
talents.desc: Increases Crit Rate by 10% against enemies above 50% HP. Increases Crit Rate by 10% against enemies below 50% HP.

talents.name: Symphonic Aria
talents.desc: Enhances Healing by 10% for targets affected by Healing Melody.

talents.name: Vitality Unleash
talents.desc: 7% of DMG dealt and 15% of healing done is stored as Rhythm. Within 10s after you cast Center Stage, the use of Expertise and Healing Beat consumes Rhythm to grant up to 40% bonus healing. The cap for Rhythm storage is 30 times MATK.

talents.name: Encore Chain
talents.desc: Within 10s after you cast Encore, each use of Expertise Skill triggers Encore Strings for targets affected by Encore.

talents.name: Tower Resonance
talents.desc: Permanently benefits from Encore effect. Each trigger of Encore Strings reduces the remaining CD of Expertise by 1 second.

talents.name: Stat Resonance Overload
talents.desc: For 15s after actively casting Encore, the stat bonuses provided by Healing Melody are +100%.

talents.name: Center Stage: Concerto
talents.desc: The charges of Center Stage increase by 1.

talents.name: Absolute Center Stage
talents.desc: After you use Center Stage, the number of enhanced skills increases from 1 to 2.

talents.name: Spiral Flame
talents.desc: After casting Center Stage, summon a wave of Sonic Surge.
